case_title: GARY MEADE VS. JUANITA OLIVER et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVER, JUANITA LAWRENCE, SABRINA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT **PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION**, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEADE, GARY SERVED NOV-04-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, SABRINA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEADE, GARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLIVER, JUANITA LAWRENCE, SABRINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1394 HAYES STREET, APARTMENT B, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEADE, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVER, JUANITA LAWRENCE, SABRINA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
